title: Learning Science and Fun in Daily Life
article_text: Science is fun because it helps us understand basic ideas about our world. We must protect our natural resources like water and air to keep a healthy balance. The author of a new book says exercise is useful for both body and mind. My male friend operates a small restaurant and enjoys his work. He uses his income to buy property and save for the future. A good diet can encourage strong hair and healthy skin. We can reflect on our daily actions to find the basis for a better life. Pollution can damage the environment and cause disease in plants and animals. Obviously, we need to learn the application of science in everyday life. I saw a hot document about a new pattern for clean energy in the science class.

sentences.en: Science is fun because it helps us understand basic ideas about our world.
sentences.zh: 科学很有趣，因为它帮助我们理解关于世界的基本概念。

words.eng_def: the study of the natural world

sentences.en: We must protect our natural resources like water and air to keep a healthy balance.
sentences.zh: 我们必须保护像水和空气这样的自然资源，以保持健康的平衡。

words.eng_def: something useful that people have or use
a state where things are equal or stable

sentences.en: The author of a new book says exercise is useful for both body and mind.
sentences.zh: 一本新书的作者说锻炼对身体和心灵都有用。

words.eng_def: a person who writes a book or article

sentences.en: My male friend operates a small restaurant and enjoys his work.
sentences.zh: 我的男性朋友经营一家小餐馆，并且喜欢他的工作。

words.eng_def: a place where you buy and eat food

sentences.en: He uses his income to buy property and save for the future.
sentences.zh: 他用他的收入购买房产并为未来存钱。

words.eng_def: money you get from work or business
something that someone owns, like land or a building

sentences.en: A good diet can encourage strong hair and healthy skin.
sentences.zh: 良好的饮食可以促进强健的头发和健康的皮肤。

words.eng_def: to make someone want to do something or to help something grow
thin strands that grow on the head or body

sentences.en: We can reflect on our daily actions to find the basis for a better life.
sentences.zh: 我们可以反思日常行为，找到更好生活的基础。

words.eng_def: the main idea or fact that supports something

sentences.en: Pollution can damage the environment and cause disease in plants and animals.
sentences.zh: 污染会破坏环境，并在动植物中引起疾病。

sentences.en: Obviously, we need to learn the application of science in everyday life.
sentences.zh: 显然，我们需要学习科学在日常生活中的应用。

words.eng_def: in a way that is easy to see or understand
the use of an idea or method in a real situation

sentences.en: I saw a hot document about a new pattern for clean energy in the science class.
sentences.zh: 我在科学课上看到一份关于清洁能源新模式的抢手文件。

words.eng_def: very warm; also popular or new
a piece of paper or electronic file with information
a repeated design or way of doing something

quiz.question_en: What is the English word for '保护'?
What is the English word for '疾病'?
What is the English word for '收入'?
What is the English word for '作者'?
What is the English word for '鼓励'?

image_prompts: A smiling teacher in front of a blackboard with science symbols like a test tube and planet, students looking happy.
A clean river with trees and birds, a sign saying 'Protect Our Resources' next to a balanced scale.
A person sitting at a desk writing a book, with a title 'Exercise for Health' on the cover.
A man in a chef hat cooking in a small restaurant kitchen, with customers at tables.
A person counting money and looking at a house and a savings jar labeled 'Future'.
A plate of healthy food like vegetables and fruit, with shiny hair and glowing skin around it.
A person sitting quietly, thinking, with a light bulb above their head and a ladder labeled 'Basis'.
A polluted factory with smoke, a sad tree and a sick animal lying on the ground.
A classroom with students looking at a poster of science applications in daily life, like a light bulb and a car.
A student holding a paper with a sun and wind turbine pattern, titled 'Clean Energy'.
